📚 Template Library

HTML

.html files in this folder, excluding this index.

Blank Tables
Blank editable tables for custom trackers.
Episode Template
Podcast / show episode tracker.
Expenses
Expense log with totals.
Important Documents
Vital-records checklist with local attachments.
Knowledge Map
Tabular knowledge graph.
Log
Script or tool log.
Progress
Multi-item progress tracker.
Project
Project hub with tasks, table, and progress slider.
Quote Log
Quote collection.
Readme
Readme template.
Symptoms
Symptom tracker with history.
Tasks
Checkbox task list and notes table.
Topic Cluster
Simple radial mind map.
Writing Tracker
Writing progress tracker.

Folders

Activity Tracker
Daily activity counter with export.
Widgets
Widgets folder.
